summary: Ukrainian forces continued intensive Shahed drone strikes across multiple fronts while Russian tactical aviation deployed guided bombs in Donetsk. Kyiv warned of a potential large‑scale Russian combined strike, prompting a US embassy alert of imminent air attacks. Both sides reported significant infrastructure damage, including a hit on a Russian chemical plant and a fatal drone strike on a funeral column in Sumy.
key_points: Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs over Donetsk region, indicating heightened air strike activity (Source: @kpszsu/62498).
Ukrainian Shahed drones flew over 30‑plus targets across Kharkiv, Dnipropetrovsk, Sumy, and other oblasts, with multiple clusters heading toward central Ukraine (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66937).
Ukraine reported a Russian drone attack on a funeral column in Sumy, causing at least one serious casualty (Source: @UkraineNow/81401).
Zelensky announced intelligence of a planned Russian combined strike using "орєшніка" weapons, possibly targeting Kyiv (Source: @UkraineNow/81406).
The US Embassy warned of a possible massive Russian air attack across Ukraine within the next 24 hours (Source: @UkraineNow/81407).
A Russian warship, ZAID, is transporting over 35,000 t of seized Ukrainian grain from occupied Crimea to Turkey, using AIS spoofing (Source: @UkraineNow/81397).
Ukrainian SBU drones struck the Russian Metafrax Chemicals plant in the Perm region, halting production for a key military supplier (Source: @UkraineNow/81400).
Ukrainian forces damaged Russian transport infrastructure at ZAES Enerhodar, destroying eight staff buses and two passenger buses (Source: @tass_agency/377230).

sections.executive_summary: Russian tactical aviation deployed guided bombs in Donetsk, escalating air operations. Ukrainian Shahed drone swarms intensified across multiple fronts, striking civilian and military targets. Kyiv warned of a looming large‑scale Russian combined strike, prompting a US embassy alert of imminent air attacks.

points: Ukrainian Shahed drones flew over Kharkiv, Dnipropetrovsk, Sumy, and other oblasts, with clusters of 20‑31 drones heading toward central regions, indicating a coordinated aerial harassment campaign (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66937).
A Russian drone struck a funeral column in Sumy, killing one person and injuring several; local authorities are assessing casualties (Source: @UkraineNow/81401).
Ukrainian SBU drones hit the Metafrax Chemicals plant in the Perm region, a key supplier of explosives and aerospace components, halting its production line (Source: @UkraineNow/81400).

Ukrainian forces reported damage to Russian transport infrastructure at ZAES Enerhodar, destroying eight staff buses and two passenger buses, reducing logistical capacity (Source: @tass_agency/377230).
President Zelensky disclosed intelligence of a planned Russian combined strike using "орєшніка" weapons, potentially targeting Kyiv and other strategic sites (Source: @UkraineNow/81406).
Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs over Donetsk, marking an escalation in precision strike capability (Source: @kpszsu/62498).
Russia organized a media visit to the Starobelsk college strike site in LNR, inviting foreign correspondents after initial denial of the attack (Source: @tass_agency/377205).
The Russian warship ZAID is transporting over 35,000 t of seized Ukrainian grain from occupied Crimea to Turkey, using AIS spoofing to conceal its route (Source: @UkraineNow/81397).
Russian officials reported the capture of Colombian mercenary William‑Andres Gallego, who urged Ukrainian troops to surrender (Source: @tass_agency/377232).
Russia warned of possible large‑scale air operations, with the US embassy noting a 24‑hour window for a massive strike across Ukraine (Source: @UkraineNow/81407).
Ukrainian Shahed drones from Donetsk region flew toward Kharkiv, with 31‑35 drones crossing the front line, threatening rear areas and logistics hubs (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66938).
Russian guided bombs struck targets in Donetsk, likely aimed at Ukrainian defensive positions and supply lines (Source: @kpszsu/62498).
Ukrainian forces reported a drone strike on a funeral column in Sumy, an eastern city, causing civilian casualties (Source: @UkraineNow/81401).
Ukrainian SBU drones hit the Metafrax Chemicals plant in Perm, affecting Russian eastern industrial capacity (Source: @UkraineNow/81400).
Ukrainian Shahed activity was noted over the Enerhodar area, damaging buses at the ZAES transport workshop (Source: @tass_agency/377230).
Shahed drones were observed over Chernihiv and Sumy regions, with clusters heading toward Poltava and Kyiv directions, indicating pressure on northern supply routes (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66937).
Ukrainian intelligence warned of a possible Russian combined strike targeting Kyiv, heightening northern defensive alerts (Source: @UkraineNow/81406).
Russian tactical aviation activity was reported on the north‑east front, suggesting preparation for air strikes near front‑line positions (Source: @kpszsu/62523).
A single Shahed drone was tracked near Semenivka in Chernihiv oblast, showing continued low‑level threats (Source: @eRadarrua/93196).
Ukrainian forces noted Shahed activity over the border area of Kharkiv‑Donetsk, potentially threatening northern flank logistics (Source: @kpszsu/62511).
Shahed drones from Kherson and Mykolaiv regions headed toward Kirovohrad, with 10 drones targeting the Kropyvnytskyi district, threatening southern supply corridors (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66938).
Ukrainian Shahed activity was reported over Mykolaiv, with several drones intercepted, indicating ongoing aerial pressure on the southern front (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66937).
Russian warship ZAID, carrying seized Ukrainian grain, transited from occupied Crimea toward Turkey, highlighting Russia's use of maritime routes for economic warfare (Source: @UkraineNow/81397).
Ukrainian forces reported a drone strike on the oil terminal "Grushovaya" in Novorossiysk, a strategic southern energy hub (Source: @UkraineNow/81392).
Shahed drones were observed over the border area of Kharkiv‑Donetsk, potentially threatening southern logistics via the Dnipro corridor (Source: @kpszsu/62519).
Russian tactical aviation deployed guided bombs over Donetsk, marking a shift toward precision strike tactics (Source: @kpszsu/62498).
Ukrainian Shahed drone swarms were reported across multiple oblasts, with over 30 drones in some clusters, stressing air defense systems (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66937).
US embassy warned of a possible massive Russian air attack within 24 hours, indicating a potential escalation in air operations (Source: @UkraineNow/81407).
Ukrainian SBU drones successfully struck the Metafrax Chemicals plant in Perm, demonstrating deep‑strike UAV capability (Source: @UkraineNow/81400).
Russian air activity was noted on the north‑east front, with increased tactical aviation presence near front‑line areas (Source: @kpszsu/62523).

key_developments: Russian tactical aviation launched guided aviation bombs over Donetsk, intensifying precision air strikes against Ukrainian positions (Source: @kpszsu/62498).

Ukrainian Shahed drones conducted large‑scale raids across Kharkiv, Dnipropetrovsk, Sumy, and other oblasts, with clusters of up to 31 drones threatening civilian and military targets (Source: @mon1tor_ua/66937).
A Russian drone attacked a funeral column in Sumy, killing one person and injuring several civilians (Source: @UkraineNow/81401).
President Zelensky disclosed intelligence of a planned Russian combined strike using "орєшніка" weapons, potentially targeting Kyiv (Source: @UkraineNow/81406).
The US Embassy warned of a possible massive Russian air attack across Ukraine within the next 24 hours (Source: @UkraineNow/81407).
Ukrainian SBU drones struck the Metafrax Chemicals plant in the Perm region, halting production at a key Russian military supplier (Source: @UkraineNow/81400).
Russian warship ZAID is transporting over 35,000 t of seized Ukrainian grain from occupied Crimea to Turkey, employing AIS spoofing (Source: @UkraineNow/81397).
Ukrainian forces damaged Russian transport assets at ZAES Enerhodar, destroying eight staff buses and two passenger buses (Source: @tass_agency/377230).
sections.threat_assessment: Russian air assets are shifting toward precision guided munitions, while Ukraine faces a surge in Shahed drone attacks across all fronts, stretching air defenses. Intelligence suggests Russia may execute a coordinated combined strike, potentially employing novel weaponry against Kyiv. The presence of deep‑strike Ukrainian drones demonstrates growing capability to hit strategic Russian industrial targets, adding a new dimension to the conflict.
sections.regional_response: Western partners, notably the United States, have issued alerts of imminent large‑scale Russian air operations, prompting heightened alert levels in Ukrainian air defense units. NATO allies are monitoring the escalation but have not yet committed additional air assets. Regional authorities in affected oblasts are reinforcing civil defense measures and evacuations amid increased drone activity.
sections.intelligence_notes: Open‑source monitoring indicates a marked increase in Shahed drone sortie rates, suggesting expanded Russian UAV supply lines. The reported Russian use of guided aviation bombs points to improved targeting intelligence. Ukrainian deep‑strike drone operations against Russian industrial sites may encourage further covert actions behind enemy lines. Continued scrutiny of maritime grain shipments is essential to assess Russia's economic warfare tactics.
